items.text:
Arsh,

Yeh khat main tumhe us daur se likh raha hoon jahan zindagi chal rahi hai, magar main nahi. Jahan waqt guzar raha hai, magar andar kuch thehar gaya hai. Haar ka ehsaas itna gehra nahi, jitna thakawat ka hai — kyunki haar insaan ko gira deti hai, lekin thakawat usse uthne ka sabab bhi chheen leti hai.

Aaj kal har simt se haar mehsoos hoti hai. Magar sabse gehri baat yeh hai ke ab khade hone ka mann bhi nahi karta. Jab khud se sawal karta hoon — "Khada kis ke liye hoon?" — to jawab khamoshi ban kar dil mein utar jaata hai.

Haath mein kalam rehti hai aksar,
Magar alfaaz kagaz tak pahunchne se pehle hi thak jaate hain.
Aur jab zabaan chalti hai…
Toh naam un logon ka rehta hai,
Jinka zubaan par aana bhi shayad munasib nahi hota.

Yeh bhi ek ajeeb si haalat hai —
Ke kar bahut kuch sakta hoon,
Magar karna kuch bhi nahi chahta.

Jaise dil ke andar poora samandar ho,
Magar lehrein uthne se inkaar kar rahi ho.

Zindagi bas guzar rahi hai…
Magar har guzarta lamha kuch sikha kar jaata hai.
Kabhi dard ke zariye,
Kabhi sukoon ke lamhon ke zariye.

Kabhi mehsoos hota hai —

"Har roz kuch toot kar samajh aata hai,
Aur har raat kuch ban kar uthta hoon main."

Har din kuch naya realise hota hai.
Kabhi bura lagta hai, kabhi achha bhi lagta hai.
Magar sabse gehri baat yeh hai —
Har ehsaas ek nayi seekh ban kar reh jaata hai.

Ab khane-pine se bhi matlab kam reh gaya hai.
Jaise zaruratein kam ho gayi ho,
Aur soch gehri ho gayi ho.

Magar kahin andar ek roshni ab bhi baqi hai.
Ek umeed —
Ke ek din main khada ho jaunga.

Aur us din…
Dobara nahi baithunga.
Sirf chalunga.

"Gir kar baithna aadat nahi meri,
Bas ek daur hai… jo guzar jayega."

Shayad is liye bhi —
Ke chhoti si zindagi mein main sirf ek baar hara hoon.
Aur woh bhi… jaan kar hara hoon.

Kyuki harana nahi tha.

Us din ke baad…
Jeetne ka mann hi nahi raha.

Jaise dil ne faisla kar liya ho —

"Ek baar haar kar khamosh ho gaya hoon,
Ab jab bolunga, toh jeet kar bolunga."

Ab iss khamoshi mein ghar sa ban gaya hai.
Dard ajnabi nahi raha.
Isterab bhi saathi ban gaya hai.

Yeh chaar diwaarein jo kabhi tanhaai deti thi,
Ab sukoon dene lagi hain.

Chand log hain saath…
Aur jo nahi hain —
Woh dil mein hain.

Aur jo dil mein hote hain…
Woh saamne ho ya door,
Kabhi juda nahi hote.

Kabhi kabhi mehsoos hota hai —

"Kuch chehre yaadon mein bas jaate hain,
Aur phir faasle bhi unhe door nahi kar paate."

Mujhe maloom hai —
Sab chahte hain main wapas khada ho jaun.
Woh ban jaun jo main ban sakta hoon.
Sab achha hi sochte hain…
Aur main unki soch ki qadar karta hoon.

Bas intezaar itna hai —
Ke koi saamne se keh de,
Ke chahte kya hain mujhse.

Tab tak…
Main khamoshi mein hoon.
Seekh raha hoon.
Samajh raha hoon.
Aur shayad… khud ko dobara bana raha hoon.

Kyuki zindagi ne yeh bhi sikha diya hai —

"Rukna bhi safar ka hissa hota hai,
Aur khamoshi bhi awaaz ban jaati hai."

Main ruka hoon…
Magar khatam nahi hua.

Aur jab wapas aaunga —
Toh sirf khada nahi hounga…
Chalunga.

Aur jis din ek baar jeet gaya…
Uske baad har baar jeetunga.

Kyuki yeh wapas aana nahi hoga —
Yeh dobara paida hona hoga.

Aur shayad us din main yeh keh paunga —

"Main gira bhi tha, main thahara bhi tha,
Magar main khatam kabhi nahi hua,
Jo khamoshi mein khud ko dhoond leta hai,
Woh laut kar aksar badal chuka hota hai."

Aur aakhir mein —

"Abhi main khamosh hoon toh yeh samajh lena,
Kii main apni awaaz taiyaar kar raha hoon,
Jo ek baar uth kar chal diya,
Phir woh safar nahi… itihaas likh diya karte hai."

Tumhara hi,
Khamoshi mein ghar banaye hue
Wapas lautne ki tayyari mein
items.title: Khudse Khud ko ek khat: Khamoshi Ke Us Mod Par, Jahan Main Thahar Gaya Hoon
Agar Tum Saath hote
items.text:
Tum,
Yeh khat main tumhe us lamhe se likh raha hoon
jahan zindagi apne sabse aham mod par khadi hai.
Ek aisa mod jahan se ya toh insaan apni duniya basa leta hai…
ya phir dheere dheere khud se hi bichhad jaata hai.
Ajeeb baat yeh hai ke iss daur mein
sab kuch mere haath mein hote hue bhi…
mera mustaqbil tumhari maujoodgi se juda mehsoos hota hai.
Main kaamyaab bhi ho sakta hoon.
Main har woh maqam hasil kar sakta hoon
jiska log sirf tasavvur karte hain.
Magar yeh bhi sach hai —
ke agar tum saath na hue,
toh shayad sab kuch paa kar bhi
andar se khaali reh jaunga.
“Kuch log naseeb nahi badalte,
Bas insaan ki himmat badal dete hain.”
Aur tum…
shayad meri himmat ho.
Aaj kal har cheez mumkin lagti hai,
magar har mumkin cheez ke peeche
tumhari ek chhoti si “haan” khadi nazar aati hai.
Jaise meri poori zindagi
ek dua ki tarah thehri hui ho…
aur us dua ka qubool hona
sirf tumhari awaaz ka mohtaaj ho.
Kabhi kabhi sochta hoon —
agar tum saath hote,
toh shayad main itna nahi thakta.
Itna nahi rukta.
Itna nahi toot-ta andar se.
Kyunki kuch log mohabbat nahi dete…
bas insaan ko yakeen de dete hain
ke woh haarne ke liye paida nahi hua.
“Tumhara saath mil jaata toh shayad yeh hota,
Ke main waqt se nahi… taqdeer se ladta.”
Tumhe maloom bhi nahi hoga,
magar mere andar kitni jang chalti rehti hai roz.
Ek taraf woh insaan hai
jo poori duniya jeetna chahta hai.
Aur doosri taraf woh khamoshi
jo sirf tumhari kami mehsoos karti hai.
Main aksar khud se kehta hoon —
ke mujhe kisi sahaare ki zarurat nahi.
Magar phir dil dheere se tumhara tasavvur kar leta hai…
aur meri saari zid toot jaati hai.
Sach kahun?
Mera urooj sirf meri mehnat par mabni nahi.
Kuch logon ki maujoodgi bhi insaan ko buland bana deti hai.
Aur tum unhi logon mein se ho.
Tum saath hote toh shayad
main zyada behtar likhta.
Zyada behtar jeeta.
Aur shayad…
khud ko itna tanha mehsoos na karta.
“Ek tera saath kya mila hota,
Main khud se bhi jeet gaya hota.”
Mujhe duniya ka darr nahi lagta.
Shikast ka bhi nahi.
Magar tumhara door rehna…
yeh cheez mujhe andar se kamzor kar deti hai.
Jaise kisi ne samandar se lehrein cheen li ho.
Ajeeb hai na?
Insaan poori duniya ke liye mazboot ban sakta hai,
magar ek shakhs ki khamoshi usse andar se gira deti hai.
Aur phir bhi…
main tum par bojh nahi banna chahta.
Main yeh nahi chahta ke tum majboori mein saath raho.
Bas itna chahta hoon —
ke agar kabhi meri taraf dekho,
toh samajh pao ke meri poori koshishon ke peeche
ek jagah tum bhi ho.
“Mera mustaqbil sirf meri mehnat se nahi juda,
Kuch duaein bhi chahiye hoti hain jeetne ke liye.”
Main jaanta hoon,
insaan ko khud chalna padta hai.
Magar kuch safar aise hote hain
jahan kisi ka saath
raaston se zyada zaroori lagne lagta hai.
Aur tum…
mera wahi safar ho.
Agar tum saath hote,
toh shayad main duniya ko alag nazar se dekhta.
Har shikast mukhtasar lagti.
Har mushkil halka bojh lagti.
Kyunki phir mujhe pata hota —
ke chahe duniya mere khilaaf ho,
koi ek shakhs hai
jo meri taraf khada hai.
“Insaan tab nahi jeetta jab woh taqatwar hota hai,
Insaan tab jeetta hai jab koi us par yaqeen karta hai.”
Aur shayad…
mujhe tumhare yaqeen ki zarurat hai.
Baaki sab toh mil hi jayega ek din.
Maqam bhi.
Izzat bhi.
Fatah bhi.
Bas afsos sirf itna rahega —
ke us fatah ke safar mein
agar tum saath na hue…
toh shayad woh fatah bhi adhoori lagegi.

Tumhara Thaka-Haara hua,
Intezaar mein
— Arsh
